key_metrics_output: Recovery efficiency, polymer type identification, organic matter removal efficiency, density separation performance, ATR-FTIR spectroscopy analysis
Recovery efficiencies were calculated and the impact of the reagents on the microplastics was quantified using Attenuated Total Reflectance (ATR) Fourier Transform-Infrared (FTIR) spectroscopy
The efficiency of organic matter removal using hydrogen peroxide, potassium hydroxide and Fenton's reagent was measured
The recovery efficiency of microplastics was variable across polymer types
